content: The intrinsic curiosity signals generated by ICM (intrinsic curiosity module) in autonomous curious agents can act as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for long-term memory in 2025 cutting-edge active learning agents, filtering out low-information unlabeled data samples before they are committed to agent memory. This creates a self-sustaining active learning loop where only high-curiosity, high-information samples are retained for future policy updates, reducing memory bloat and improving sample efficiency.
